cards.back: A function that assigns a non-negative real number (probability) to each possible outcome of a random variable.
A function that assigns a non-negative real number (probability density) to each possible outcome of a random variable, such that the total probability is equal to 1.
A random variable that can take on only a finite number of distinct values.
A random variable that can take on any value within a given range or interval.
The set of all possible values that a random variable can take on.
